title: cynoglossum rindera
intro: Cynoglossum rindera, also known as Rindera or the forked-horned or glandular rindera, is a flowering plant species belonging to the borage family. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Cynoglossum rindera include its ability to soothe respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Cynoglossum rindera include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies.
